title: Iron Spawners
body:
# Iron Spawners

- This mod adds new spawners at 5 tiers.
- Iron: Spawns 3 mobs every 30 seconds.
- Gold: Spawns 3 mobs every 20 seconds.
- Emerald: Spawns 3 mobs every 15 seconds.
- Diamond: Spawns 4 mobs every 10 seconds.
- Netherite: Spawns 5 mobs every 4 seconds.

## Recipes

- Vanilla: Break vanilla spawners with silk touch.
- Iron: Surround 8 iron ingots around a vanilla spawner.
- Gold: Surround 8 gold ingots around an iron spawner.
- Emerald: Surround 8 emeralds around a gold spawner.
- Diamond: Surround 8 diamonds around an emerald spawner.
- Netherite:  Use the smithing table to apply netherite to diamond spawner.

## Use

- Simply place a spawn egg in the spawner inventory and power it.~~~~
- [Eggstracting Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/eggstracting)
- Warden, Iron Golem, and Elder Guardian eggs are disabled.

## Issues
- Report on the github repo.

## Compatibility

Compatible with JEI.
